_comment: Full rollout: facebook, x, linkedin, instagram all live. Pinterest needs board_id added to post_to_socials.js before it will work. TikTok intentionally excluded (needs video + audit).

0.hook: Mindset Sunday: one income stream is a single point of failure. Soft sell, big-picture framing.

1.hook: Monday Money Move: you don't need a course, you need a hook that works tonight. Costs less than lunch.

2.product: The Complete Digital Hustle Stack Guide
2.hook: Core Skill Tuesday: starting a side hustle used to cost thousands. The full map is $27.

3.hook: System Thursday: two days, one weekend, a real system — not theory.

4.hook: Payday Friday: prices went up, your paycheck didn't. The bundle is the third option — and bundling is built-in savings.

5.hook: Free Win Saturday: 38 steps, 8 pages, $0. Your weekend project, mapped. Builds the email list.

6.product: The Complete Digital Hustle Stack Guide
6.hook: Wildcard: the affordable full-system play for anyone who found you this week.
